new_cascade_issues.title: Power margin reduction
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially exceeding peak power consumption limits during imaging mode.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal margin reduction
new_cascade_issues.description: The removal of the right solar panel may affect thermal balance and stability, potentially increasing ΔT on the optical bench.

new_cascade_issues.title: Structural balance alteration
new_cascade_issues.description: The removal of the right solar panel alters the structural balance and may affect dynamic response during launch vibration.

new_cascade_issues.title: Mechanical stress redistribution
new_cascade_issues.description: The removal of the right solar panel may redistribute mechanical stresses, potentially affecting structural integrity.

new_missing_tests.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD
new_missing_tests.reason: The change may affect shock response, necessitating revalidation.
Power margin reduction may impact data processing efficiency and power consumption.
